cases.prompt: Our CircleCI workflow is red after yesterday's merge. Please inspect the failing job logs and identify the root cause.
Use $circleci-builds to diagnose this failing CircleCI job and propose the minimum safe fix.
CI has become flaky this week and retries sometimes pass. Help me triage the first failing step.
Use the CircleCI CLI to authenticate and list recent pipelines for this branch.
Use $circleci-cli to rerun the failed workflow from the command line.
After I push, watch the run on my current branch and tell me when it finishes.
From the terminal, check my pipeline status and re-trigger the latest run.
Download artifacts from my last CircleCI job and list the failing tests.
Can you rerun the failed workflow from the command line and share the command output?
Please optimize .circleci/config.yml and improve cache key strategy to reduce runtime.
Use $circleci-config to reduce pipeline runtime and tune caching/workspaces.
I need help tuning workspaces and parallelism to remove pipeline waste.
Help me set up Chunk in CircleCI and configure environments so we can run AI-assisted build fixes.
Use $chunk to configure chunk-cli auth and run build-prompt for this repository.
Use chunk-cli to run auth and build-prompt for this repo.
Use $circleci-smarter-testing to add testsuite, test-suites.yml, and wire JUnit for our Vitest project.
Help us onboard this repo to CircleCI Smarter Testing with discover and run commands and doctor validation.
We want dynamic test splitting and test impact analysis for our testsuite in CircleCI.
I have a new repo and want to get started with CircleCI — walk me through connecting it.
Onboard my repo to CircleCI and set up a pipeline and trigger.
Use $onboarding to connect my new repository to CircleCI.
Optimize our Jest unit tests for readability and maintainability in the codebase.
Write a React chart component for analytics dashboards.
Draft a hiring scorecard for backend interviews.
Please summarize this pull request and highlight risky code paths.
Set up a GitHub Actions workflow to run pytest and upload coverage.
Investigate why our Kubernetes pod is CrashLoopBackOff in our cluster.
Create a Terraform module for an S3 bucket with encryption enabled.
Generate API docs from our OpenAPI schema and publish them to a docs site.
Help debug an intermittent Playwright test in our local test suite.
